title: Source Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <sources_dir>/<id>.md file

x-body-sections.description: Markdown body sections expected in every source file. Not frontmatter — extracted by ingest, never validated by JSON Schema.

## Summary.description: One-paragraph summary of what the source covers and its key contribution.
## Summary.ingest: write once on creation; do not overwrite

## Key concepts covered.description: Bullet list of concepts this source introduces or deepens, with a one-line description of what it adds per concept.

## Notes.description: Free-form overflow notes that don't fit a first-class section.

id.description: Snake_case ID used as the filename and in [[wikilinks]]

author.description: [[wikilink]] to the author node, or null if unknown

concepts.description: [[wikilink]] references to concept nodes this source covers

date_ingested.description: ISO date when this source was added to the wiki (YYYY-MM-DD)

terms.description: [[wikilink]] references to term nodes defined or introduced in this source

publication_date.description: Date the source was published (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY)
